assertionResults.fullName: features/analytics/utils/median returns null when fewer than 3 data points (default threshold)
assertionResults.title: returns null when fewer than 3 data points (default threshold)

assertionResults.fullName: features/analytics/utils/median computes the median of an odd-length array
assertionResults.title: computes the median of an odd-length array

assertionResults.fullName: features/analytics/utils/median computes the median of an even-length array as average of two middle values
assertionResults.title: computes the median of an even-length array as average of two middle values

assertionResults.fullName: features/analytics/utils/median does not mutate the input array
assertionResults.title: does not mutate the input array

assertionResults.title: handles a single repeated value

assertionResults.fullName: features/analytics/utils/median respects a custom minDataPoints threshold
